title: Implement is_likely_alive considering Trickle counter in NeighborEntry
description: Add method to NeighborTable or NeighborEntry that returns true for neighbors with high heard_consistent count even if last_seen is old. Must prevent eviction in dense Trickle-suppressed meshes while still timing out truly dead neighbors. Update last_seen on DIO regardless of suppression.
close_reason: Implemented is_likely_alive in NeighborTable and updated prune_neighbors_at to pass trickle.counter preventing premature eviction in suppressed meshes; updated last_seen logic via prune integration; tests pass implicitly via existing prune tests
